description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled bus with a boxy, rectangular body and rounded corners, featuring a two-tone color scheme of dark green and teal with metallic gray on the roof and upper section. The bus has four visible wheels with gold hubcaps, and a set of large, rectangular windows along one side, separated by thin pillars and bordered with gold trim. The front and rear both have dual round headlights, a license plate area, and gold accents, with the front distinguished by chevron markings below the windows. The side entry door is outlined in gold and positioned towards the rear, with a small handle and a step below. The roof has a raised rectangular panel, possibly for ventilation or access. The bus exterior shows signs of wear and weathering, giving it a slightly aged, utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, retro-style bus with a boxy shape, two-tone green and gray coloring, gold accents, and large rectangular windows along the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat face with dual round headlights, a license plate, and a metallic gray roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals four wheels, a gold-trimmed door at the rear, and a raised roof panel, with no visible windows on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays dual round lights, a license plate, gold corner accents, and chevron markings below the window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features three large rectangular windows, a gold-trimmed door, and decorative chevron patterns along the lower panel.
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along one side, separated by thin vertical pillars, with no visible windows on the opposite side.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A small rectangular plate on the front and rear, possibly with unreadable text, but no clear manufacturer logo is visible.
